title: SG LawWatch
description: Singapore legal news and reference articles

sg-gov-newsrooms.title: SG Government Newsrooms
sg-gov-newsrooms.description: News and announcements from Singapore government ministries and judiciary — speeches, press releases, parliamentary replies, and announcements.

mlaw_news.description: News and announcements from the Ministry of Law Singapore — press releases, speeches, parliamentary speeches, and announcements from 2026.

columns.id: Unique identifier (SHA-256 hash of source URL)
columns.title: Title of the news item or speech
columns.category: Content type: press-releases, speeches, parliamentary-speeches, announcements
columns.source_url: URL to the original page on mlaw.gov.sg
columns.summary: AI-generated summary highlighting key policy and legal points (~100 words)
columns.content_text: Full extracted article text (hidden — query directly)
columns.created_at: Timestamp when this record was first imported

judiciary_news.description: News, speeches, and media releases from the Singapore Judiciary — Supreme Court, State Courts, Family Justice Courts, and related tribunals. From 2026 onwards.

columns.id: Unique identifier (SHA-256 hash of source URL)
columns.title: Title of the news item, speech, or media release
columns.content_type: Type of item: Speech, Media Release, Media Advisory, etc.
columns.courts: Pipe-separated court names (e.g. Supreme Court|State Courts)
columns.source_url: URL to the original page on judiciary.gov.sg
columns.summary: AI-generated summary highlighting key judicial developments (~100 words)
columns.content_text: Full extracted article text (hidden — query directly)
columns.created_at: Timestamp when this record was first imported

agc_news.description: Press releases, media statements, speeches, and prosecution updates from the Attorney-General's Chambers Singapore. From 2026 onwards.

columns.id: Unique identifier (SHA-256 hash of source URL)

columns.category: Content type: press-release, media-statement, speech, appointment, prosecution, other
columns.source_url: URL to the original page on agc.gov.sg
columns.summary: AI-generated summary highlighting key legal and institutional developments (~100 words)
columns.content_text: Full extracted article text (hidden — query directly)
columns.created_at: Timestamp when this record was first imported

sg-gov-newsrooms.about: Providing free access to structured data for research, analysis, and application development

sglawwatch.title: SG LawWatch
sglawwatch.description: Singapore legal news and reference articles from Singapore LawWatch, the Singapore Academy of Law's daily legal news syndication site.

headlines.description: Legal news headlines with AI-generated summaries, collated from The Straits Times, The Business Times, Lianhe Zaobao, TODAY, and other sources.

columns.id: Unique hash identifier for the headline record
columns.category: News source publication (e.g., Straits Times, Business Times, Lianhe Zaobao, MinLaw)
columns.title: Headline title of the news article
columns.source_link: URL link to the original article on Singapore LawWatch
columns.author: Author of the news article, prefixed with publication name
columns.date: Publication date of the article in ISO 8601 format
columns.summary: AI-generated summary of the article content
columns.text: Full extracted text content of the news article
columns.imported_on: Timestamp when the record was imported into the database

headlines.about: Providing free access to structured data for research, analysis, and application development

about_singapore_law.description: Reference articles from the About Singapore Law section, covering legal topics and guides for the public.

columns.id: Unique hash identifier for the article
columns.item_url: URL of the article on Singapore LawWatch
columns.title: Title of the reference article
columns.section: Topical section the article belongs to (e.g., Criminal Law, Family Law)
columns.home_page: URL of the section home page
columns.last_scraped: Timestamp of the last successful scrape
columns.content_length: Character count of the full article text

sglawwatch.about: Providing free access to structured data for research, analysis, and application development
